text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It is the day of the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having reached the Classics, Maruzensky is filled
with emotion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to inspire the younger students once
more, Maruzensky turns to the track and gets
ready to race.
